description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal beige siding, complemented by white window trim and architectural details. The front facade features a prominent double garage with dark brown paneled doors and a main entryway with an arched wooden door and a small overhang. Large, symmetrically placed windows dominate the front and side elevations, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roofline is varied, with intersecting gables and dormers adding visual interest and depth. The overall design suggests a modern take on traditional American residential architecture, suitable for a family in an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A two-story suburban house with beige siding, dark gray gabled roofs, a double garage, and large, symmetrically arranged windows. The main entry features an arched wooden door and a small overhang.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry with arched door, and prominent gabled rooflines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the intersecting gables, upper-story window, and symmetrical window arrangement on the lower level.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the arched entry door, additional windows, and the layered roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and clear view of the roof's complex geometry.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door with a small overhang, no porch or columns, flanked by windows and set into a projecting section of the facade.
